blended.narrative: Sunshine Village is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 3,548 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 13°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 15°F. Expect powder.
